── PASS COMPLETE · v0.3.0 · 2026-05-29 ──────────────────────

Title: Discord REST client lands, zero deps
Summary: bumper now pulls changelog reports over the raw Discord REST API with no client library, and traces every run to <#0000000000000000000>.

Highlights:
· Raw fetch-based Discord client — no discord.js, no new dependencies
· One-pass buffer resolves the second-most-recent report by default
· Every run posts an observability trace to <#0000000000000000000>; the token is never logged

Commit: 10a0217
Tests: 25 passed · 0 failed · 0 skipped
Branch: clean
